summary: V57.0 Masonry & Carpentry Workbenches - All tests pass. Both 3D Circular Trade Workshops are fully functional with 6 materials, 9 tools, 6-depth Recursive Dive, inline tutorials, and XP integration. All endpoints open to guests (no auth). Navigation from Sovereign Hub verified.
test_credentials: Guest mode - no auth required for workshop endpoints
context_for_next_testing_agent: V57.0 Workshop Trades verified: (1) Masonry Workbench at /masonry-workbench loads with 6 stones (granite, marble, limestone, slate, sandstone, basalt), 9 tools in sprocket ring, center stone block, mastery bar, (2) Clicking center stone opens Material Dive panel with 6 depth levels (L0-L5), (3) Clicking tool shows tool info panel, increments action counter, generates tutorial, (4) Stone selector switches center block material, (5) Carpentry Workbench at /carpentry-workbench loads with 6 woods (oak, walnut, pine, cherry, maple, cedar), 9 tools, center wood block, mastery bar, (6) Clicking center wood opens Grain Dive panel with 6 depth levels, (7) All backend endpoints open to guests: GET /api/workshop/masonry/stones (6 stones), GET /api/workshop/masonry/tools (9 tools), POST /api/workshop/masonry/tool-action, GET /api/workshop/carpentry/woods (6 woods), GET /api/workshop/carpentry/tools (9 tools), POST /api/workshop/carpentry/tool-action, (8) Both workshops accessible from Sovereign Hub under 'Sovereign Council' pillar, (9) Bottom toolbar visible and unobscured on both pages, (10) No modals - everything inline as specified.

features_verified.masonry_page_loads: PASS - /masonry-workbench loads with all UI elements
features_verified.masonry_6_stones: PASS - Granite, Marble, Limestone, Slate, Sandstone, Basalt
features_verified.masonry_9_tools: PASS - Trowel, Mash Hammer, Chisel, Square, Level, Plumb Bob, Jointer, Bolster, Pitching Tool
features_verified.masonry_center_block: PASS - Stone center block with SVG rendering
features_verified.masonry_mastery_bar: PASS - Shows Initiate level with action counter
features_verified.masonry_material_dive: PASS - Opens on center click with 6 depth levels (L0-L5)
features_verified.masonry_tool_click: PASS - Shows tool info panel, increments counter, generates tutorial
features_verified.masonry_tutorial_panel: PASS - Appears after tool action with technique description
features_verified.carpentry_page_loads: PASS - /carpentry-workbench loads with all UI elements
features_verified.carpentry_6_woods: PASS - White Oak, Black Walnut, Eastern White Pine, American Cherry, Hard Maple, Western Red Cedar
features_verified.carpentry_9_tools: PASS - Panel Saw, Smoothing Plane, Bench Chisel, Joiner's Mallet, Marking Gauge, Spokeshave, Coping Saw, Brace & Bit, Try Square
features_verified.carpentry_center_block: PASS - Wood center block with grain SVG rendering
features_verified.carpentry_mastery_bar: PASS - Shows Initiate level with action counter
features_verified.carpentry_grain_dive: PASS - Opens on center click with 6 depth levels
features_verified.carpentry_tool_click: PASS - Shows tool info panel, increments counter, generates tutorial
features_verified.carpentry_tutorial_panel: PASS - Appears after tool action with technique description
features_verified.backend_masonry_stones: PASS - GET /api/workshop/masonry/stones returns 6 stones with dive_layers
features_verified.backend_carpentry_woods: PASS - GET /api/workshop/carpentry/woods returns 6 woods with dive_layers
features_verified.no_auth_required: PASS - All 6 workshop endpoints accessible without authentication
features_verified.hub_navigation: PASS - Both workshops accessible from Sovereign Hub > Sovereign Council pillar
features_verified.bottom_toolbar_visible: PASS - Toolbar not obscured on both pages
features_verified.no_modals: PASS - Everything inline, no modal overlays detected
